content: How i can find PVP content?
is it just me or is helot pretty damn strong in traphase
like wtf she one turns my team lol
If not interrupted, helot otk on turn 3 / 4
kinda wanna use the selector on helot LOL
theres a meta team that uses tinct right?
Apply slow and be mildly annoying
what are the other members of the team?
Tinct? She's more support you can put anywhere than the focus of a team from my experience
Go find a rat in rankings
theres one deck she also is part in....
guys how do you deal with the piece of crap team that is tawil celeste?

Use otk team, kill them all in one turn
Helot, liz, lily, 24, lotan. Select whichever otk core awaker you want
That or just run good aoe
Celeste revive gets countered by good aoe
jsut got killed by tawil rat again
is jenkins an otk comp or is it just beats you to death
Beats you to death in a slow and annoying way

I don't get mad at otk comps cuz it's quick and painless like a bullet to the head. You can just go next game
But rat is like death by CBT.
At least rat got nerf again
Seems like hardly anyone is still playing Jenkins
i still run into jenkins alot lol
are the nerfs really implemented yet?
maybe because lower elos arent running the better teams so jenkins can get away with more matchups there
im too lazy to reach 2k lmao
not sure, just dont feel like doing teh story so i only play traphase haha
i tried to go for her earlier but failed the second pity so forget it lol
Rat takes damage on card played
but tawil can just res immediately
like i hate it she just rewinds the whole thing

But if the player is big brain
They will keep playing the cards to damage themselves to like 1 hp then tawil rewind themselves same turn
It becomes free aliemus and completely backfires
Backfires on the daff player trying to counter rat
wait but she can only rewind right? so if the turn starts at half hp itll still be half hp and jenkin's hp is really low
You know of daff's debuff right? Damage self on playing card
It can backfire if they have tawil and big brain
well i dont have daffo anyway so i cant paly daffo haha

Say the rat starts turn with like 65.
Rat plays 4 cards, takes 60 damage gains 30 aliemus and 5 hp left.
Tawil rewind same turn and back to 65, doll to remove debuff then keep cooking
<@452731110556696596> how does helot team work? any necessary wheels?
so that was the team mengluo dropped a thosand points on
man looks like i screwed up
i used a selector on helot because i was sick of getting clapped by tawil celeste teams
but i dont have the right wheels
It clears turn 3 / 4 just fine but the problem is getting to turn 3 / 4
how do you even get falling sun lol
damn so its unplayable since i dont have rose nor falling sun
oh its the battle pass wheel
Sometimes in life lotan ults 5 times in a turn and there is nothing you can do
but the play style might be a little different
haha but of course i dont have daffo's signature
hmm there's another alternative again but I'll show you in like 10 mins
lol sorry i was taking my food
Erica+Unending performance is starting to be an issue
With people running high value exalts
what kinda team archetype is that?
while you're at it craux, what are the other non limited wheels youd recommend?

this could work. but you need either:
1. a support that can give strength buff to helot
2. a second dps to clear the remaining enemy (usually Liz)

the reason for that is because helot's exalt damage is "edging". when helot doesn't have any buff + has 10 stack of power, the damage it dealt is very close enough to kill them all. that's why people usually use rose or falling sun to cover that.

but you can still make the other way by using support that can boost helot's damage or use a second dps to clear the remaining enemies
for the other members of the team , winkle, aurita and gdoll
use this wheel to your support
theres no way i have all these haha
it doesn't have to be pious tbh, anything that give helot strengthen buff works
yeah nymph you guessed it im trying to do helot, and used my selector on her only to realize i dont have the wheels to make her work
standard selectors arent hard to come by over time
it doesn't have to be strengthen either
hence the reason why winkle is used in helot team
yeah winkle and aurita to put the injuries and vulnerables right?
btw what does rose victory do?
the description is in chiense lol
theres some more text but its nothing
gives 3 barrier , every turn a barrier turns int ocharge
hard to navigate such levels of slow
yeah, injuries are good way to remove enemy shield
i used to run team like this but i prefer helot + liz
the "nothing" is the important part tbh
which team atm ults more than once with rose
i think the deck wouldn't be so strong if you change everything 😭😭
